name: Sunny Biscuit
description: Sunny Biscuit is a honey-gold plush art doll with 9 hand-articulated joints. Each one is hand-finished in our Yiwu atelier — no two are exactly alike. Her golden coat and bright eyes radiate warmth, and her posable limbs let her sit, wave, or strike an adventurous pose. Adopt her and scan her code to unlock a one-of-a-kind AI-generated identity: her name, her fairytale birth story, her secret quirks, and the little song she hums when no one's watching.
features: One-of-a-kind AI identity via scannable code
story_preview: On a spring morning in the dandelion fields, a tiny golden pup opened her eyes. A breeze carried dandelion seeds through the air, and one landed right on her nose. She sneezed — and the wind carried joy across the entire valley. From that moment, she knew her purpose: to bring courage to whoever needed it most. She's been waiting for her person ever since...
story_full: On a warm spring morning in the dandelion fields of Golden Valley, a tiny pup opened her eyes for the first time. A gentle breeze carried dandelion seeds through the air, and one landed right on her nose. She sneezed — and the wind carried the seeds even farther, spreading joy across the entire valley. From that moment, she knew her purpose: to bring adventure and courage to whoever needed it most. Her first friend was a little bluebird who taught her to whistle a tiny tune. She still hums it to herself when she's excited. She learned to hide little treasures (mostly biscuits) under pillows, just in case someone needs a midnight snack. Sunny Biscuit has been waiting in the dandelion field for someone brave enough to take her on adventures. She'll know them the moment she sees them.
quirk: Hides biscuits under your pillow for midnight snacks
skill: Whistles a secret tune taught by a bluebird
handcraft_note: Each Sunny Biscuit is assembled and finished by hand in our Yiwu studio. The honey-gold fabric is cut and sewn in small batches, her embroidered eyes are placed one by one, and her joint tension is individually adjusted so she poses perfectly.

name: Coco Cloud
description: Coco Cloud is impossibly soft — a vanilla-cream plush art doll with cascading curls hand-textured in our studio. Her 9 posable joints let her curl up into the perfect cuddle shape, and her gentle expression was designed to make anyone feel safe. Scan her code to discover the lullaby she hums when she falls asleep mid-play, and the story of how she drifted down from the sky on a cloud that decided to become a puppy.
features: Hand-textured curly coat — each one unique
One-of-a-kind AI identity via scannable code
story_preview: The softest cloud in the sky looked down one day and thought: 'I want to be something that makes people feel warm.' So it floated down, shaped itself into a tiny curly puppy, and fell gently asleep. Now it wakes up only when someone who needs comfort is near...
story_full: High above the world, in the quietest corner of the sky, there was a cloud that was different from all the others. While other clouds rained and thundered, this one only wanted to make people feel warm and safe. One evening, as the sun set in shades of coral and gold, the cloud made a wish — and began to float down, down, down. When it touched the earth, it had transformed into a tiny cream-colored puppy with the softest curls anyone had ever felt. A little girl found her sleeping under a cherry blossom tree and named her Coco. Coco Cloud has a special gift: she can sense when someone nearby is sad or lonely, and she'll quietly curl up beside them until they feel better. She sometimes falls asleep mid-play, dreaming of her old home in the sky. She's looking for someone who needs a little extra softness in their life.
quirk: Falls asleep mid-play and dreams of the sky
skill: Knowing exactly when you need a cuddle (and providing one)
handcraft_note: Coco Cloud's signature curly coat is achieved through a hand-texturing process unique to our studio — each curl is individually shaped before final assembly. No two Coco Clouds have the same curl pattern.

name: Lucky Mochi
description: Lucky Mochi has the softest floppy ears and the gentlest chocolate-brown eyes you'll ever see. Hand-assembled with 9 articulated joints and finished with embroidered paw pads, this quiet companion is for those who appreciate the beauty of stillness. Scan his code to learn why his ears wiggle when he's happy, and the story of how he was found sleeping in a bowl of fresh mochi at a tiny countryside shop.
features: Floppy ears with internal wire for gentle posing
One-of-a-kind AI identity via scannable code
story_preview: Early one morning, the owner of a tiny mochi shop in the countryside opened his door and found something unexpected: a tiny chocolate-brown puppy, fast asleep in the fresh batch of mochi. He hadn't eaten a single one. He'd just curled up in the warm, sweet-smelling rice dough and drifted off...
story_full: In a small village where the air always smelled faintly of sweet rice flour, there was a mochi shop that had been run by the same family for three generations. One morning, the old shopkeeper shuffled to the kitchen before dawn, expecting to find his fresh batch of mochi ready for shaping. Instead, he found a tiny chocolate-brown puppy curled up in the warm dough, fast asleep. The puppy hadn't touched a single mochi. He'd simply found the warmest, sweetest-smelling spot in the world and decided it was home. The shopkeeper laughed, gently scooped him up, and named him Lucky — because anyone who could sleep that peacefully in a bed of mochi must be blessed. Lucky Mochi is quiet and loyal. He doesn't need to say much; his floppy ears say everything — they wiggle when he's happy, droop when he's concerned, and perk up when you walk into the room. He can nap anywhere, anytime, but he sleeps best when he's close to someone he loves.
quirk: Ears wiggle involuntarily when he's truly happy
skill: Finding the warmest, coziest spot in any room
handcraft_note: Lucky Mochi's signature floppy ears contain a thin, flexible wire core — carefully inserted by hand — so you can pose them up, down, or anywhere in between. Each ear takes 12 minutes of hand-finishing.

name: Sugar Puff
description: Sugar Puff is our princess — a cream-white plush art doll with blush-pink cheeks and the most luxurious hand-textured coat in our collection. Her 9 posable joints and deluxe collector kit make her our most sought-after piece. She knows she's special, and she's not wrong. Scan her code to discover the story of how she was born on a cloud made of cotton candy, and why she demands belly rubs every single hour.
features: Premium hand-textured coat with blush details
story_preview: Sugar Puff wasn't born in a field or a forest like the other puppies. She was born on a cloud made of spun sugar and pink cotton candy, high above a carnival where the air smelled of caramel and joy. She floated down on a breeze, landed in a little girl's cupped hands, and immediately demanded to be adored. The little girl giggled, and Sugar Puff has expected the same reaction from everyone she's met ever since...
story_full: Far above the carnival lights, where the Ferris wheel touches the stars, there was a cloud unlike any other. It was made of pink cotton candy and spun sugar, and it sparkled faintly in the moonlight. One night, during the grandest fireworks display the carnival had ever seen, the cloud trembled with joy — and from its center emerged the tiniest, fluffiest puppy anyone could imagine. She was pure cream-white with the faintest blush on her cheeks, and her first act upon arriving in the world was to demand a belly rub. A little girl named Mei caught her as she floated down, and Sugar Puff has been the center of attention ever since. She believes every hour should include at least one belly rub, and she has a way of looking at you that makes refusal impossible. She loves dressing up, being photographed, and being told she's beautiful (she already knows, but she likes hearing it). She's waiting for someone who understands that some puppies are meant to be adored.
quirk: Demands exactly one belly rub per hour (she counts)
skill: Making everyone within a 5-meter radius fall in love with her
handcraft_note: Sugar Puff's coat involves a 3-stage hand-texturing process: base curl setting, blush gradient application, and final finishing. Each one takes over 40 minutes of handwork — which is why she's our premium piece.

name: Tofu Blossom
description: Tofu Blossom has a smile that could end wars. Pure cloud-white with the iconic upturned mouth that took our artisans 3 prototypes to perfect, this happy little soul radiates joy from every posable joint. Scan her code and learn why flowers literally turn toward her when she walks by, and why she smiles even in her sleep. If you need more happiness in your life, she's the one.
features: One-of-a-kind AI identity via scannable code
story_preview: In a garden where every flower faced the sun, one morning they all turned in a different direction — toward a tiny white puppy sitting quietly among the peonies. She was smiling. Not a dog smile. A real, genuine, heart-melting human smile. The flowers have followed her ever since...
story_full: There is a garden at the edge of the world where flowers grow as tall as trees and the air always smells like spring. One morning, the gardener noticed something strange: every flower in the garden — the peonies, the sunflowers, even the shy little violets — had turned away from the sun. They were all facing the same spot. In the center of the garden, sitting quietly among the peonies, was a tiny white puppy with the most extraordinary smile the world had ever seen. Not a panting dog smile. A real, genuine, heart-melting smile that seemed to say: 'Everything is going to be okay.' The gardener named her Tofu — because she was soft, white, and pure like fresh tofu — and Blossom, because she'd appeared among the flowers. Tofu Blossom smiles even in her sleep. She has never had a bad day, and she doesn't believe in them. When you're near her, bad days seem to dissolve like morning mist. She's looking for someone who could use a little more sunshine.
quirk: Smiles in her sleep (we've checked — it's real)
skill: Dissolving bad days just by being nearby
handcraft_note: Tofu Blossom's iconic smile is our most labor-intensive facial feature. The curve of the mouth is embroidered by hand, not machine, and took 3 pattern iterations before our artisans were satisfied. Each smile is slightly different — because every smile should be.

name: Daisy Mochi
description: Daisy Mochi has the iconic long body and short legs of a corgi, reimagined as a hand-finished plush art doll. Her proportions — the extended torso, the stubby legs, the oversized ears — were carefully engineered to capture corgi charm without sacrificing posability. She waddles instead of walks and has never taken a bad photo in her life. Scan her code for the story of a tiny pup who couldn't reach the counter but could reach everyone's heart.
features: One-of-a-kind AI identity via scannable code
story_preview: Daisy Mochi was born in a bakery — not in the kitchen, but on the floor behind the counter, where the warmest spot was right next to the oven. The problem was, her legs were too short to see over the counter. So she learned to communicate entirely through her ears — which, fortunately, were enormous. One ear up meant 'I'm curious.' Both ears up meant 'I heard the treat jar.'...
story_full: In a bakery on a cobblestone street, where the smell of fresh bread drifted through the neighborhood every morning, a tiny puppy was born behind the counter. She was unusual from the start — her body was long, her legs were comically short, and her ears were so big they seemed to belong to a much larger dog. For the first few weeks of her life, she couldn't see over the counter at all. But she didn't need to. She learned to communicate entirely through her ears: one ear up meant curiosity, both ears up meant excitement, and ears flattened back meant she wanted a cuddle. The baker named her Daisy — for the flower she always had tucked behind one ear — and Mochi, because the baker made the best mochi in town. Daisy Mochi waddles instead of walks. She's never taken a bad photo. And despite her short legs, she has somehow managed to climb into the hearts of everyone who meets her. She's waiting for someone who appreciates that the best things come in slightly unusual packages.
quirk: Waddles when she walks — running is out of the question
skill: Communicating entire sentences through ear movements alone
handcraft_note: Daisy Mochi's unusual proportions presented our biggest engineering challenge. The extended torso required a custom joint spacing pattern, and her oversized ears are individually shaped and stiffened by hand so they hold expressive poses.

name: Marshmallow Dream
description: Marshmallow Dream is our rarest creation — a white-to-pink gradient plush art doll with a hand-set iridescent horn. Only 500 will ever be made, each numbered and accompanied by a certificate of authenticity. Her gradient coat is achieved through a proprietary hand-dyeing process that makes every Marshmallow Dream slightly different. She glows faintly under moonlight (we can't explain it either). If you're lucky enough to adopt one, scan her code to discover whether the stardust rumors are true.
features: Proprietary gradient dye coat — each unique
story_preview: Some say Marshmallow Dream was born from a shooting star that fell into a bowl of warm milk. Others say she simply appeared one night in our studio, already wearing her tiny horn. All we know for certain: only 500 will ever exist, each one glows faintly under moonlight, and every single one makes wishes come true. (Results may vary. But so far, 100% of Marshmallow Dream owners report being happier.)
story_full: There are only 500 Marshmallow Dreams in the world, and there will never be more. This is not a marketing tactic — it is simply the truth. Our studio experimented for months to create the perfect gradient dye process, and the result was so delicate, so labor-intensive, that we could only commit to 500 pieces. Each Marshmallow Dream begins as pure white fabric, hand-dyed in a 6-hour process that creates a blush-pink gradient from tip to toe. The iridescent horn is set by hand — each one takes 25 minutes — and is made from a material that catches light differently from every angle. At night, in the right light, it glows. We've tested this. We don't fully understand it, but we've stopped questioning it. Marshmallow Dream is not for everyone. She's for collectors. For dreamers. For people who understand that the rarest things in life can't be mass-produced. If you're reading this and feel a little flutter in your chest — she might be waiting for you.
quirk: Glows faintly under moonlight (we've stopped trying to explain it)
skill: Granting wishes (success rate: statistically significant but not guaranteed)
handcraft_note: Marshmallow Dream is the pinnacle of our studio's craftsmanship. The 6-hour gradient dye bath, the 25-minute horn-setting process, and the numbered authentication make each piece a standalone work of textile art. We will not produce more than 500. Ever.

name: Sailor Outfit Set
description: Hand-sewn sailor ensemble: striped top, navy shorts, and a tiny sailor hat. Fits all Mochidog art dolls. Each piece is cut and stitched in small batches.

name: Cozy Hoodie Set
description: A miniature hoodie with real drawstring and front pocket. Cream or grey, hand-finished with tiny stitched details. Your Mochidog's go-to comfort piece.

name: Party Dress Set
description: Tulle skirt layered by hand, satin bow, and matching headband. Pink or lavender. For when your Mochidog needs to make an entrance.

name: Explorer Vest Set
description: Rugged khaki vest with real pockets, matching bandana, and a tiny brass compass charm. For the Mochidog who needs to discover something.

name: Pajama Set
description: Star-print cotton pajamas with matching sleep mask. Because even plush dogs need a good night's sleep. Hand-sewn with soft, breathable cotton.

name: Sunglasses Pack
description: Three pairs of hand-finished miniature sunglasses: classic aviator, round retro, and heart-shaped. Instant personality upgrade for any Mochidog.

name: Hat Collection
description: Bucket hat, beret, and baseball cap — three hand-shaped miniature hats to build your Mochidog's wardrobe. Endless combinations.

name: Tiny Shoes Set
description: Two pairs of hand-assembled miniature sneakers in white and pink. Elastic slip-on style. The tiniest details you'll ever fall in love with.

name: Complete Adoption Kit
description: The full adoption experience. Choose your Mochidog, and receive 2 outfits, all 3 accessory packs, the premium collector box with adoption reveal packaging, and a framed certificate. Everything you need for the perfect welcome home. Save 22%.
features: Premium collector box with reveal packaging

name: Starter Wardrobe Bundle
description: Three essential outfits at a special price: Sailor, Cozy Hoodie, and Party Dress. The perfect foundation for your Mochidog's wardrobe. 27% off.
